properties.displayName: Nessus - Login from New or Unseen IP Address
properties.description: Detects successful logins to the Nessus web UI from an IP address not seen in the previous 14 days. May indicate access from an unexpected location or compromised credentials.
properties.query:
let lookback = 14d;
let knownIPs = NessusLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(1h))
| where LogType == "BackendLog" and BackendMessage has "successful login"
| distinct BackendSourceIP;
NessusLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where LogType == "BackendLog" and BackendMessage has "successful login"
| where BackendSourceIP !in (knownIPs)
| project TimeGenerated, BackendUsername, BackendSourceIP
| extend AccountCustomEntity = BackendUsername, IPCustomEntity = BackendSourceIP
